fields._indicationColor: The field to change the color value for when doing status indications.
fields.MeterMode: The mode the tool is currently in.
fields.MeasureInObjectSpace: If measurements should be done in global space or parent space.
fields.RaycastIgnoresUsers: Whether the tool raycast ignores colliders with an active user.
fields.MultiPoint: Measure between two points, or any amount of points.
fields._lastPoint: The slot of the last point placed by the tool.
fields._currentMeter: The current object displaying the distance between points.
fields._currentLineTransform: The current line transform object being used to display the distance between points
